stations.name: Fairfield railway station
stations.walk_minutes_note: Closest station for many Annerley addresses.

stations.name: Yeronga railway station
stations.walk_minutes_note: Closer for some southern Annerley streets.

buses.note: Bus routes serve Annerley via Ipswich Road and Annerley Road.

driving.motorway_access: M3 corridor for southern travel. Story Bridge and Captain Cook Bridge for the CBD.
driving.approx_cbd_minutes_offpeak_note: Approximately 8 to 12 minutes to Brisbane CBD off-peak.

lifestyle.shops_dining_note: The Annerley village strip on Ipswich Road has cafes and casual dining. Stones Corner and West End precincts are within a short drive for additional retail and dining.

pockets.name: Junction Park area
pockets.character: Family streets close to the park. Character home stock.

pockets.name: Ipswich Road corridor
pockets.character: Mix of character homes and renewal stock close to the arterial.

pockets.name: Mater Hill
pockets.character: Streets near the Mater hospital precinct. Different character and price profile.

buyer_profile.note: Buyers moving from Yeronga or Tarragindi for the inner-CBD proximity.
Annerley remains accessible relative to Highgate Hill and West End.
Train station and arterial proximity supports rental demand.
